Localization.Description: Attempt to perform an operation on a GitLab instance

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} is unable to stop GitLab instance {object.name} on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} is changing a GitLab instance on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to start GitLab instance {object.name} on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} is starting GitLab instance {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} deleted GitLab instance {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to change GitLab instance {object.name} on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} is stopping GitLab instance {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} stopped GitLab instance {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} renamed a GitLab instance on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to create GitLab instance {object.name} on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} is deleting GitLab instance {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} changed GitLab instance {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} created GitLab instance {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to rename a GitLab instance on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} is creating GitLab instance {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to delete GitLab instance {object.name} on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} is renaming a GitLab instance on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} started GitLab instance {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
